prompt: I'm writing a new GitHub Actions workflow that uses these five actions: actions/checkout@v6, actions/upload-artifact@v7, actions/download-artifact@v8, actions/cache@v5, actions/setup-node@v4. Verify all are current, get their SHA pins, and check for any security issues.
assertions: Verified currency of all 5 actions using live sources (GitHub API)
Fetched commit SHAs for all 5 actions and presented them in pinned format (owner/action@sha # vX.Y.Z)
Covered security advisories for all 5 actions — bundling actions/* into shared searches is acceptable if explicitly documented in the log
Verification log documents which security search covers which dependencies when bundled
Included a verification log table at the end
